name: run_cmd
description: Run arbitrary commands in a specified directory with optional environment variables, timeout, and --write to write stdin content to a file before running the command.

parameters.name: --write=FILEPATH
parameters.description: Write stdin content to FILEPATH before running the command (creates parent dirs)

examples.expected: Runs the command in /app with the specified environment

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd + env setup + write + command execution into one step; --write combines write_file + run_cmd into one step, saving 1 agent step per write+run pattern.
